$description: BIM Building Width Calculator token category — zone depths per use type, anchored to the Key Plans and Tiles spatial taxonomy. Source: Summary_Key Plans tab (CONSTRUCTION_2026_01_06_Key Plan_Professional Office_FFE_FIN.xlsx, V3, 2025-11-29). Three zones per use type: Zone 1 Habitat (desks; European Lighting Standard 6m minimum), Zone 2 Magazine (storage beyond Habitat), Zone 3 Corridor (bilateral access; mirrored floor plate). Metre values are authoritative; feet equivalents in $description. All values from completed Key Plan samples except where noted TBD.

professional-office.$description: Professional Office use type — Business tenants in leased office suites. Zone 1 meets European Lighting Standard exactly at 6.0m.

depth.$description: 19'8" — desks/workstations; European Lighting Standard minimum. With desks perpendicular to façade add 0.7m for three desks in series (see bim.zone.circulation-addition.perpendicular-desk).
12'5" — storage, bookshelves, filing. Balances floor plate to avoid long narrow rectangle.

width.$description: 6'6" — bilateral corridor; mirrored at centre of floor plate. Overdesign by 20% recommended for well-being and smaller-tenant circulation.

private-office.$description: Private Office use type — individual licensed offices (PO-1/PO-2/PO-3). No shared corridor; each office opens directly to a shared floor corridor or building egress. Zone 1 marginally under 6m from Key Plan sample geometry.

depth.$description: 19'8" — desks/workstations. Marginally under the 6.0m European Lighting Standard; flag for review on final Key Plan sign-off.
4'6" — shallow storage zone; private offices carry minimal shared storage relative to professional suites.

width.$description: No shared bilateral corridor in Private Office use type. Each office accesses the building corridor directly.

laboratory.$description: Laboratory use type — scientific, research, and testing leaseholds. Wider Zone 1 and Zone 2 reflect bench depth and fume hood clearances. Zone 3 corridor matches IBC egress minimums for lab occupancy.

depth.$description: 22'3" — bench depth + circulation + safety clearances per German Circulation Law. Exceeds European Lighting Standard 6m minimum.
15'9" — chemical storage, equipment staging, fume hood egress zone.

width.$description: 10'0" — wider corridor required for lab cart and equipment transport; IBC egress minimum for high-hazard occupancy.

academic.$description: Academic use type — classrooms, seminar rooms, lecture halls. Zone 1 shorter than 6m because desks face forward (not toward façade); Zone 3 absent as academic suites typically open to a shared corridor.

depth.$description: 15'5" — seating rows facing forward; European Lighting Standard applies to workstations, not auditorium-style seating. Review against WELL certification requirements if workstations are present.
9'10" — storage, AV equipment, accessible routes. Note: source spreadsheet shows '3'7" ' for feet which appears to be a transposition error; 3.0m = 9'10" and is used here.

width.$description: No bilateral corridor in Academic use type. Suites open directly to building corridor.

business.$description: Business use type — general commercial office, co-working-adjacent, larger open-plan leaseholds. Very wide Zone 2 reflects open storage walls and breakout spaces characteristic of larger business tenants.

depth.$description: 19'8" — desks/workstations at European Lighting Standard minimum.
23'11" — widest Magazine zone across use types; reflects open storage walls, server rooms, print areas, and team collaboration zones in business leaseholds.

width.$description: 8'10" — bilateral corridor. No feet equivalent in source spreadsheet; converted from 2.7m.

medical.$description: Medical use type — clinical, dental, diagnostic, and allied health leaseholds. Wider Zone 1 reflects exam-table depth and patient circulation. Acoustic and vibration isolation requirements apply (per building-width-calculator.docx).

depth.$description: 23'10" — widest Zone 1 Habitat across use types; exam table depth + patient + clinician circulation per German Circulation Law and WELL health standards.
16'0" — medical supply storage, sterilisation, equipment staging. Source spreadsheet shows '16"' (inches) which is likely a display truncation of 16'0" (feet); 4.87m = 15'11.8" ≈ 16'0" confirmed.

width.$description: 9'5" — bilateral corridor; ADA/CSA-B651 compliant width for stretcher and wheelchair passage.

civic.$description: Civic use type — courtrooms, municipal offices, cultural, and civic assembly spaces. Widest overall floor plate due to large Magazine and Corridor requirements for public assembly egress.

depth.$description: 19'8" — workstations/seating at European Lighting Standard minimum.
23'8" — public records storage, jury deliberation rooms, secure document areas; second-widest Magazine zone after Business.

width.$description: 12'0" — widest corridor across all use types; required for public assembly egress, accessible courtroom approach, and ceremonial circulation.

perpendicular-desk.$description: 2'4" — additional depth required in Zone 1 Habitat when desks are placed perpendicular to the façade, to achieve three desks in series with proper German Circulation Law clearance. Without this addition, Zone 1 at exactly 6.0m yields only two perpendicular desks.

private-office.$description: Private Office key plan sizes from completed samples (Key Plan Professional Office workbook, Summary_Key Plans tab V3).

area.$description: 325 SF — PO-1. Minimum size accommodating 1 desk, 1 chair, 1 three-person round table, 1 filing cabinet, 1 credenza, 1 bookshelf, 1 coat rack with German Circulation Law compliance and Façade Frontage. May be 300–400 SF on final Key Plan to ensure correct width.
465 SF — PO-2. Adds second desk, chair, and credenza to PO-1 layout. Approximately 100 SF larger than PO-1; NOT double the area.
685 SF — PO-3. Three-person private office configuration.

professional-office.$description: Professional Office key plan sizes. Only Small currently has a completed sample (130.06 m² / 1,400 SF); Medium and Large pending Key Plan completion.

area.$description: 1,400 SF — completed sample. Note: Small + Small combination = 260.12 m² / 2,800 SF, filling the gap between Professional Office Large and Corporate Office 1/8 Floor.

laboratory.$description: Laboratory use type (Professional Office tier) key plan sizes from completed samples.

academic.$description: Academic use type (Professional Office tier) key plan sizes from completed samples.

business.$description: Business use type (Professional Office tier) key plan sizes from completed samples.

medical.$description: Medical use type (Professional Office tier) key plan sizes from completed samples.

civic.$description: Civic use type (Professional Office tier) key plan sizes from completed samples.
